lore:quest.name: Echoes Beneath
lore:quest.description: The glyphs on the ruins rewrote themselves the night before the Awoken arrived. Maelis Vane needs someone with younger knees — and older destiny — to stand before three ruin fragments and listen.
steps: Accept the quest from Maelis Vane in her archive.
Visit the Sunken Archway east of the village.
Visit the Shattered Bell Tower west of the village.
Visit the Moss-bound Obelisk south of the village.
The quest completes automatically at the final site.
